# 出生日期转换年龄

1993-10-18=>27 
<script>
import moment from 'moment'
  export default {
    data() {
      return {
        age:0,
        birthday:'1993-10-18',
      }
    },
    created(){
      this.getAge(this.birthday)
    },
    methods: {
      getAge (birthday) {
        const text = moment(birthday, 'YYYY-MM-DD').fromNow()
        this.age = parseInt(text, 10)  // 注意：parseInt(string, radix);第二个参数不能省略，否则会报Lint错误
        if (isNaN(this.age)) {
          this.age = '未知'
        }
        console.log(this.age)
        return this.age
      },
    }
  }
</script>
隐藏代码
